query:
-- Fix pontaj table: add missing columns, rename wrong ones
ALTER TABLE pontaj 
  ADD COLUMN `isApproved` boolean DEFAULT false AFTER `notes`,
  ADD COLUMN `correctionRequested` boolean DEFAULT false AFTER `approvedBy`,
  ADD COLUMN `correctionNote` text AFTER `correctionRequested`;

-- Copy data from old columns to new ones
UPDATE pontaj SET 
  `isApproved` = CASE WHEN `status` = 'approved' THEN true ELSE false END,
  `correctionRequested` = CASE WHEN `status` = 'submitted' THEN true ELSE false END,
  `correctionNote` = `correctionReason`;

-- Drop old columns that don't exist in schema
ALTER TABLE pontaj 
  DROP COLUMN `status`,
  DROP COLUMN `correctionReason`,
  DROP COLUMN `isLocked`;
